provisional_caveat_for_P009.draft_text: Stokes-multiplier discrimination (companion milestone M8b) supplies an additional structural axis on which the master classification of Φ refines; current numerical paths to the second Stokes constant S_2 for the d=2 PCF Painlevé-III dichotomy are foreclosed at laptop-feasible precision (cf. SIARC bridge sessions T37M, 017c, 017e, 2026-05-03), and a literature-direct closed-form expression is not currently available (cf. Costin 2008 Theorem 5.26 = first Stokes constant only; Barhoumi--Lisovyy--Miller--Prokhorov 2024 = Riemann-Hilbert structural characterisation of monodromy data). The classification result of Φ does not depend on a closed-form value of S_2; M8b is enrichment, not gate.
provisional_caveat_for_P009.use_condition: valid only if P-008 draft Phi statement remains within the schema-level fragments audited (umbrella v2.0 §4 + picture v1.18 M9 block + CT v1.3 §Implications). If P-008 introduces a closed-form-value clause for S_2, this caveat must be discarded and the audit re-run.
